_comment: Legal entities for Amitours Holding — the entity that actually pays a given invoice. Stream is the cost-bearer (business unit), Legal Entity is the bank account / company that wires the money. They are NOT 1:1: a single Stream like 'AA · Alps2Alps' can pay via 'Alps2Alps OU' OR 'Amitours Holding' depending on bank balance / tax optimisation. Bookkeeper picks the payer at the Awaiting CEO / Awaiting Payment stage.
_source: Tester request 2026-06-07 (Rita): 'please add legal entity column in order we can see at once from what entity payment should be made / was made.'
